Summary: Baseline current web join/token reliability
Description: Capture baseline for token prejoin success, status-0 CORS incidence, paid/unpaid join outcomes in staging and local.
Acceptance Criteria: Baseline report attached with reproducible failure steps and metrics.

Summary: Freeze dependency versions for release candidate
Description: Lock Flutter/Web/Agora dependency versions for two-week stabilization window.
Acceptance Criteria: Version freeze committed and documented in run report.

Summary: Normalize web API host resolution
Description: Implement deterministic API host resolution for web builds across environments.
Acceptance Criteria: Web requests resolve to expected host in local and staging without manual override.

Summary: Harden CORS policy for group-class and token endpoints
Description: Review and fix CORS headers/origins/methods for join and group-class APIs.
Acceptance Criteria: No status-0 CORS failure in repeated prejoin tests.

Summary: Add explicit token prejoin diagnostics
Description: Return structured error reasons for prejoin failures (authz, enrollment, policy, network).
Acceptance Criteria: Client logs and API responses expose machine-readable failure reasons.

Summary: Run paid vs unpaid prejoin reliability pass (3/3)
Description: Execute repeated token prejoin tests for paid and unpaid roles and record outcomes.
Acceptance Criteria: Paid path succeeds 3/3; unpaid path blocked 3/3 with correct UX.

Summary: Add regression tests for join authorization parity
Description: Extend tests to guarantee parity between enrollment/payment state and join authorization.
Acceptance Criteria: Automated tests fail on authz parity regressions and pass on current build.

Summary: Implement flyer fallback hierarchy on all listing surfaces
Description: Ensure flyer->tutor avatar->placeholder fallback is applied consistently in tutor/learner list and detail surfaces.
Acceptance Criteria: No crashes and consistent image behavior across all screens.

Summary: Handle invalid image URL and null states safely
Description: Add robust URL validation/error builders and graceful fallback transitions.
Acceptance Criteria: Invalid/expired URLs do not break layout or trigger runtime errors.

Summary: Add/refresh app tests for flyer fallback parity
Description: Update tests to assert fallback behavior for flyer, avatar, and placeholder cases.
Acceptance Criteria: Relevant test suite passes and verifies all fallback states.

Summary: Perform UX review pass for affected screens
Description: Product/design validation for create/discovery/tutor surfaces after fallback updates.
Acceptance Criteria: Product signoff captured and any polish issues triaged.

Summary: Execute UAT matrix lane 1 (1:1)
Description: Run create->enroll->pay->join and capture evidence for 1:1 capacity lane.
Acceptance Criteria: Full evidence pack attached and lane marked pass/fail with notes.

Summary: Execute UAT matrix lane 2 (1:3)
Description: Run create->enroll->pay->join and capture evidence for 1:3 capacity lane.
Acceptance Criteria: Full evidence pack attached and lane marked pass/fail with notes.

Summary: Execute UAT matrix lane 3 (1:5)
Description: Run create->enroll->pay->join and capture evidence for 1:5 capacity lane.
Acceptance Criteria: Full evidence pack attached and lane marked pass/fail with notes.

Summary: Fix and rerun critical defects from UAT
Description: Resolve blockers from UAT lanes and rerun impacted scenarios.
Acceptance Criteria: All critical defects closed or risk-accepted with EM approval.

Summary: Verify observability for QoE and join outcomes
Description: Validate telemetry for join success, first frame, reconnect, and failure reasons.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard/query shows baseline + current metrics by role and platform.

Summary: Patch missing telemetry fields
Description: Implement any missing events or dimensions required by KPI set.
Acceptance Criteria: Telemetry completeness confirmed for release KPI checklist.

Summary: Prepare staged rollout feature-flag plan
Description: Define ramp percentages, guardrails, and rollback conditions.
Acceptance Criteria: Rollout plan approved by EM and QA.

Summary: Run rollback rehearsal
Description: Perform and time rollback drill with incident communication template.
Acceptance Criteria: Rollback succeeds within target time and runbook is validated.

Summary: Final release gate review and signoff
Description: Review evidence, open risks, and make ship/hold decision.
Acceptance Criteria: Three-way signoff recorded and release decision documented.
